The order...

As per the provisions of the Maharashtra Regulation of Transfer of Government Employees and Prevention of Delay in discharge of Government Duties Act, 2005, the following officers of the cadre of Assistant Commissioner of State Taxes in the Goods and Services Tax Department are being made general transfers and postings in front of their names to the posts indicated in column-6.

para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: VA-1226 / PR 22 / BP-2 / EO 1550469

2. The Assistant Commissioner of State Taxes, A.No.4, 8, 17, 24, 26, Bo, 38, 39, 43, Yoo and 102 of the above table, who has been provided services in the Investigation Branch under the orders of the Department of Goods and Services Tax, vide order no. (1) above, and A.No.15B.18, who has been given additional charge of the Investigation Branch under the orders of the Department of Goods and Services Tax, vide order no. (2) above.

The Assistant Commissioner of State Taxes is being transferred and posted in the Investigation Branch at the level of the Goods and Services Tax Department for a period of 03 years from the date of the original order of availability of services in the Investigation Branch as he meets the criteria for the Investigation Branch. The appointments of the Assistant Commissioner of State Taxes, who has been provided service in the Investigation Branch under the order in sub-section (1) above of the Goods and Services Tax Department, and the Assistant Commissioner of State Taxes, who has been given additional charge of the Investigation Branch under the order in sub-section (2), shall automatically cease after a period of 03 years from the date of these orders.
These orders are coming into force with immediate effect. the concerned authorities as their controllers.
Local arrangements for transfer of charge in consultation with the officers to be made and ordered to be relieved.
Join immediately at the place of posting.
4. Report of the Goods and Services Tax Department on the transfer of the officer concerned.
It should be submitted to the government immediately.

The orders are being issued with the approval of the competent authorities as per the provisions of the Maharashtra Regulation of Transfer of Government Employees and Prevention of Delay in discharge of Government Duties Act, 2005.

The government order is being published on the computer website of the Government of Maharashtra, www.maharashrtra.gov.in with the computer code 202605191109381805. The order is being authenticated with a digital signature.
By order and in the name of the Governor of Maharashtra,
